TSI.name: Total Story Index
TSI.description: The overall composite score evaluating the story's commercial and narrative viability.

NGC.name: Narrative Grip Coefficient
NGC.description: Measures how engaging and compelling the narrative structure is to the reader.

DFI.name: Demographic Fit Index
DFI.description: Indicates how well the story aligns with its intended target demographic.

HRR.name: Hook Retention Rate
HRR.description: The probability that a reader will continue reading after the initial chapters/hook.

CLS.name: Content Lifecycle Score
CLS.description: Predicts the longevity and evergreen potential of the content.

LTV/CPA.name: Lifetime Value to Cost Per Acquisition
LTV/CPA.description: The ratio of expected revenue per reader versus the cost to acquire them.

MPS.name: Monetization Potential Score
MPS.description: Evaluates the story's ability to generate revenue through various channels.

ARI.name: Audience Reach Index
ARI.description: Estimates the broadness of the story's appeal across different audience segments.

TPI.name: Trend Potential Index
TPI.description: Measures how well the story aligns with current and upcoming market trends.

IP.name: Intellectual Property Score
IP.description: Assesses the potential for franchise expansion (e.g., film, TV, games, merch).

SMS.name: Social Momentum Score
SMS.description: Predicts the likelihood of the story generating organic social media buzz and sharing.

TAI.name: Target Audience Interest
TAI.description: Measures the baseline interest level of the core demographic in the story's specific themes.

TMS.name: Target Market Size
TMS.description: Represents the total addressable market size for this specific genre and narrative.
